title: PVP AND CPVP
description: Mods to 0 delay perfect for cpvp and of course normal pvp
body:
# No delayed crystals and hit delay anymore with this modpack.
 
-  PvP battles like never before with the PVP AND CPVP Ultimate Optimization Modpack! This modpack ensures lightning-fast combat responses, seamless crystal usage, and maximum FPS and performance, delivering an unparalleled PvP experience.

- With a clean and simple hud and full customizable,makes the modpack perfect for clips.
- This Project is in Beta and some bugs can appear.
